mprInteriorPlanDimensions.Description: Various variants of element dimensioning on the plan
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h5: Handle walls with a thickness of
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h6: Exclude from the work walls in the name of the type which contains:
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h7: Exclude from the work of the wall in the material name of the layer "Structure" which contains:
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h15: Creating dimensional chains along walls on the whole floor plan. For correct work it is necessary to select all walls on the plan that form the floor of a building. Only linear elements are processed. For correct work the elements to be processed must be placed orthogonal to each other
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h16: Add a pile to the group if the distance from the pile insertion point to the insertion point of
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h17: in the group does not exceed
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h19: Creating the overall dimensions of the columns. Only rectangular columns are processed
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h20: Creating the positional dimensions of the piles. The dimensions are placed in the middle of the piles with bind to the nearest Grids, if the Grids have been selected. The piles are processed in groups. Pile groups are piles that are close to each other. Families are processed in the category "Structural columns" and "Structural foundation"
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h21: Create outline dimension when intersecting Grids
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h23: Creation of dimensions on the outer faces of the Floor and on the holes in the Floor. The dimensions on the outer faces are set for all Floor faces. The dimensions for the holes are set in the specified direction (left/right and up/down)
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h27: Creation longitudinal and transverse (thickness) dimensions of straight walls without taking into account their relationship to other walls
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h28: Transverse dimension at center of wall
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h29: Bind transverse dimension at center of wall to the nearest Grid
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h31: Bind longitudinal dimension of wall to the nearest Grid
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h34: Bind openings to the nearest Grids
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h35: Position of horizontal dimensions for openings
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h36: Position of vertical dimensions for openings
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h39: Binding the transverse dimension to the nearest grid
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h40: If no free end is available, place the dimension at the center
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h45: Creating the positional dimensions for additional reinforcement zones
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.h46: Binding the reinforcement zone to the nearest grids
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.tt1: Specify a comma-separated value that can be contained in the name of the type of the wall
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.tt5: Specify, by comma, the values that can be contained in the material name of the "Structure" layer of the wall
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.tt7: If this option is enabled, elements located below the level "Cut Plane" will not be processed
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.err2: In this set there are no walls intersected by Primary range Cut plane!
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.err3: At runtime, the program went into an endless loop! If you see this message, please contact the developer!
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.err4: It is necessary to choose more than one element!
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.err5: Among the selected elements there are no walls!
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.err8: The selected piles do not satisfy the processing conditions: failed to obtain a solid or do not have an insertion point
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.err9: Selected columns do not satisfy machining conditions: failed solid, failed faces, have no insertion point or have curved faces
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.err10: Selected floors do not satisfy the processing conditions: failed solid or failed faces
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.err11: Selected walls do not satisfy the processing conditions: failed solid or failed faces
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.err12: Selected reinforcement zones do not satisfy the processing conditions
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.s1: Filtering the initial list of walls
mprInteriorPlanDimensions.s7: Preparation of the final dimension-wall mappings
